name: The Spoon
description: A classic intimacy position focusing on closeness and comfort.
instructions: Both partners lie on their sides facing the same direction.
One partner stays behind the other, curving around their back.
Maintain close body contact for maximum intimacy.

name: The Lotus
description: An intimate, face-to-face connection ideal for slow rhythms.
instructions: The other partner sits on their lap, wrapping legs around the waist.
Wrap arms around each other for stability and closeness.

name: Standing Ovation
description: Spontaneous and exciting, requiring some balance and strength.
instructions: One partner may lift their leg or be lifted entirely depending on height difference.
Use a wall or sturdy furniture for support if needed.

name: Morning Glow
description: A comfortable variation allowing for deep connection.
instructions: One partner lies on their stomach, perhaps with a pillow under hips.
The other partner approaches from behind/above.

name: The Bridge
description: Focuses on receiving partner pleasure with comfort.
instructions: Giving partner positions themselves between the legs.

name: Cozy Chair
description: Utilizing furniture for a relaxed experience.
instructions: One partner sits on a sturdy chair or edge of bed.
Other partner straddles them facing forward.
